items.title: The seven-word reality check in Anthony Albanese's address to the nation
items.summary: The prime minister moved to reassure Australians and promised to protect the nation, but his speech wasn't without ominous undertones.

items.title: Trump says war in the Middle East will end 'pretty quickly', considering NATO withdrawal

items.title: Socceroos' opponents confirmed as every FIFA World Cup team now locked in

items.title: Leading Australian Jewish group condemns Israel's death penalty laws

items.summary: In a rare national address, Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has advised Australians how they can assist against fuel shortages.

items.summary: Donald Trump's claim of regime change has been disputed, with one expert saying he is "increasingly desperate" to frame the war as a victory.

items.title: WA Premier activates emergency powers around fuel supply
items.summary: WA Premier Roger Cook says despite success in ensuring fuel is reaching the regions, efforts are being hampered by a lack of supply visibility.

items.title: Chalmers faces recession, fuel mandate questions amid 'significant economic shock'
items.summary: Treasurer Jim Chalmers said the quicker the war in the Middle East was resolved, the sooner the global economy could recover.

items.summary: Across Australia, police are encountering more homemade firearms in seizures, including some that are largely 3D-printed.

items.summary: Bangkok in Thailand will host the first Asian edition of the Eurovision Song Contest, with at least 10 countries taking part.

items.summary: From a cultural influence that reached a global audience, to intimate moments shared by family and friends, the arts luminary and champion of her people was remembered at her funeral service.

items.title: Ex-Pinochet agent invokes controversial legal precedents to avoid extradition from Australia

items.title: Rhoda Roberts held Country. Now Country will hold her forever
items.summary: Rhoda Roberts AO loved Country and its stories. An NITV special 'Forever Held in Country' pays tribute to her enduring connection to the lands, skies and waters of this continent.
